message:
fix: address critical bugs found in deep code review

1. Fork sequence number (session.go): Return forkSeq+1 instead of 1,
   since the fork file already contains entries up to forkSeq.

2. escapeJSON incomplete (streaming.go): Use json.Marshal to properly
   escape all control characters (0x00-0x1F), not just \n\r\t.

3. ExtractMessages nil entries (fingerprint.go): Skip non-map entries
   instead of leaving nil slots that corrupt fingerprinting.

4. isStreamingRequest false positives (streaming.go): Use proper JSON
   parsing instead of string contains which could match inside values.

5. rand.Read error (proxy.go): Check error return and fall back to
   time-based uniqueness if crypto/rand fails.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
